languages.text: "Когда придет время, мы разрешим ее как подобает нашему статусу. Дуэлью, или партией в регицид. Или же вы все же сумеете убедить меня в том, что династия и протекторат в надежных руках... и я отступлюсь от притязаний".

"When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."
languages.original_text: "Когда придет время, мы разрешим ее как подобает нашему статусу. Дуэлью, или партией в регицид. Или же вы все же сумеете убедить меня в том, что династия и протекторат в надежных руках... и я отступлюсь от притязаний".

traits.locale_text: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our position. A duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

"When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our position. A duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

"When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

"When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

"When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

languages.text: "Wenn die Zeit reif ist, werden wir mit einem Duell oder einem Königsmord standesgemäß darauf reagieren. Oder es gelingt Euch, mich davon zu überzeugen, dass die Dynastie und das Protektorat in sicheren Händen sind ... dann werde ich von meinem Anspruch absehen."
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn die Zeit reif ist, werden wir mit einem Duell oder einem Königsmord standesgemäß darauf reagieren. Oder es gelingt Euch, mich davon zu überzeugen, dass die Dynastie und das Protektorat in sicheren Händen sind ... dann werde ich von meinem Anspruch absehen."

languages.text: « Le moment venu, nous résoudrons notre différend dans le respect des règles imposées aux personnes de notre rang : par un duel, ou une partie de régicide. À moins que vous ne parveniez à me convaincre que la dynastie et le protectorat sont entre de bonnes mains... auquel cas, j'abandonnerai mes revendications. »
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

traits.locale_text: « Le moment venu, nous résoudrons notre différend dans le respect des règles imposées aux personnes de notre rang : par un duel, ou une partie de régicide. À moins que vous ne parveniez à me convaincre que la dynastie et le protectorat sont entre de bonnes mains... auquel cas, j'abandonnerai mes revendications. »

languages.text: «Cuando llegue el momento, lo solucionaremos como corresponde a personas de nuestra categoría: con un duelo, o, en su defecto, una partida de regicidio. O tal vez consiga convencerme de que la dinastía y el protectorado están en buenas manos... y renunciaré a mi puesto».
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando llegue el momento, lo solucionaremos como corresponde a personas de nuestra categoría: con un duelo, o, en su defecto, una partida de regicidio. O tal vez consiga convencerme de que la dinastía y el protectorado están en buenas manos... y renunciaré a mi puesto».

languages.text: "Zamanı geldiğinde bunu statümüzdeki insanlara yakışır şekilde çözeceğiz. Bir düello ya da bir kral katili oyunuyla yani. Belki beni hanedanlığın ve protektoranın emin ellerde olduğuna ikna edersin... Ben de iddiamdan vazgeçerim."
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

traits.locale_text: "Zamanı geldiğinde bunu statümüzdeki insanlara yakışır şekilde çözeceğiz. Bir düello ya da bir kral katili oyunuyla yani. Belki beni hanedanlığın ve protektoranın emin ellerde olduğuna ikna edersin... Ben de iddiamdan vazgeçerim."

languages.text: “等时候到了，我们会用合乎身份的方式解决此事，来一场决斗，或者一盘弑君棋。又或者，你能说服我，让我相信王朝和属地正由可靠的人执掌……那我就会放弃我的诉求。”
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

traits.locale_text: “等时候到了，我们会用合乎身份的方式解决此事，来一场决斗，或者一盘弑君棋。又或者，你能说服我，让我相信王朝和属地正由可靠的人执掌……那我就会放弃我的诉求。”

languages.text: 「その時が来たら、我々の身分にふさわしい方法で解決する。決闘か、王殺しゲームか。あるいは、君が王朝と保護国が安全な手に渡ったことを説得してくれれば、私の主張を放棄するかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, we shall resolve it as befits people of our status, with a duel, or else a game of regicide. Or perhaps you will succeed in convincing me that the dynasty and the protectorate are in safe hands... and I will abandon my claim."

traits.locale_text: 「その時が来たら、我々の身分にふさわしい方法で解決する。決闘か、王殺しゲームか。あるいは、君が王朝と保護国が安全な手に渡ったことを説得してくれれば、私の主張を放棄するかもしれない。」
